law: Ensure an (AASA) file is present on your domain in the directory, and that it contains an entry for this app’s App ID for the service.
To configure the sample code project, perform the following steps in Xcode: On the Signing & Capabilities pane, to a unique identifier (you must change the bundle ID to proceed).
When adding the Sign in with Apple button to your storyboard, you must also set the control’s class value to in Xcode’s Identity Inspector.
The user must enable Two-Factor Authentication to use Sign in with Apple so that access to the account is secure.
In your implementation, the delegate function should create an account in your system using the data contained in the user identifier.
Ensure an (AASA) file is present on your domain in the directory, and that it contains an entry for this app’s App ID for the service.
